description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with lint and test stages, using global variables ARTIFACT_DOWNLOAD_ATTEMPTS, GET_SOURCES_ATTEMPTS, MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD, and packetver. In the lint stage add a newlines job that runs on debian:unstable, executes "./.tools/jobs/install.sh \"dos2unix git-core\"" then "./.tools/jobs/newlines.sh", and always stores all untracked files as artifacts for 3 weeks. Also add a spaces job on debian:unstable that runs "./.tools/jobs/install.sh \"sed git-core\"", changes directory to npc, then runs "../.tools/jobs/spaces.sh", with the same artifact settings. In the test stage add a mariadb_run_latest_gcc10 job using debian:unstable image and mariadb:latest service, sets CC=gcc-10, HERCCPPFLAGS=" -Wno-format-overflow" and ASAN_OPTIONS="detect_stack_use_after_return=true:strict_init_order=true:detect_odr_violation=0", runs install.sh with mysql-client gcc-10 git-core make autoconf automake autopoint libtool libmariadbclient-dev-compat libz-dev libpcre3-dev, then cloneall.sh, initdb.sh mariadb, build.sh with "--enable-packetver=${packetver} --enable-epoll --enable-debug --enable-sanitize=full --disable-manager --enable-Werror --enable-buildbot" "--enable-werror --enable-lto --enable-sanitize", and runserver.sh mariadb, storing all untracked files as artifacts for 3 weeks. Also add a mariadb_run_valgrind_latest job on debian:stretch image with mariadb:latest service, sets CC=gcc-6, runs install.sh with mysql-client gcc-6 git-core make autoconf automake autopoint libtool mariadb-client libmariadbclient-dev-compat libz-dev libpcre3-dev valgrind, then cloneall.sh, initdb.sh mariadb, build.sh with "--enable-packetver=${packetver} --enable-epoll --enable-debug --disable-manager --enable-Werror --enable-buildbot" "--enable-werror", and runservervalgrind.sh mariadb, also archiving all untracked files for 3 weeks.
